End_Product_Connection_Type.reason: PhCM2 supplies prephenate for downstream phenylpyruvate and phenylalanine formation; supported by pathway logic and metabolite/flux data.

Subcellular_Localization.reason: PhCM2 is explicitly described as a cytosolic chorismate mutase.

Enzyme_Name.reason: PhADT3 is an arogenate dehydratase with PDT activity; the cytosolic short isoform provides PDT-active function.

Primary_Product.reason: Phenylpyruvate is the product of PDT activity and is explicitly described.

End_Product_Connection_Type.reason: Phenylpyruvate is the immediate precursor to phenylalanine via PPY-AT.
